title: Unlock encrypted session with correct PIN to access main app
description: Verifies an authenticated user can unlock the local encrypted session with the correct PIN and then access the main app.

steps.description: Input a valid PIN into the PIN field
Verify the user lands on the main dashboard with unlocked app data available

title: Sign in with email/password to reach the app shell
description: Verifies a staff user can sign in using email and password and is taken into the authenticated app area.

steps.description: Verify the user lands in the authenticated app area

title: Create a new bengkel during onboarding and reach main app
description: Verifies an authenticated owner/admin can create a bengkel by entering a name and setup PIN and then reach the main app.

steps.description: Enter a bengkel name into the bengkel name field
Provide a valid setup PIN into the setup PIN field
Verify the user lands on the main dashboard for the new bengkel

title: View transaction list after secure login and unlock
description: Verifies that a staff member can log in, unlock the local encrypted session, and view the service transaction list.

steps.description: Fill the PIN field with a valid PIN
Click the navigation item to open the transaction list
Verify a service transaction list view is displayed

title: Create a new service transaction and see it in the list
description: Verifies that a staff member can create a new transaction with customer, vehicle, services/parts and see it appear in the transaction list.

steps.description: Fill the PIN field with a valid PIN
Click the navigation item to open the transaction list
Add at least one service item
Add at least one part item
Verify the newly created transaction is visible in the transaction list

title: Use biometric sign-in to enter the authenticated app area
description: Verifies a returning staff user can use biometric authentication from the login screen and enter the authenticated app area.

steps.description: Complete biometric authentication in the prompt
Verify the user lands in the authenticated app area

title: Block access on wrong PIN and allow retry with correct PIN
description: Verifies entering an incorrect PIN shows a validation error and a subsequent correct PIN unlocks access to the main app.

steps.description: Input an incorrect PIN into the PIN field
Verify a PIN validation error is visible
Input a valid PIN into the PIN field
Verify the user lands on the main dashboard

title: Prevent saving a transaction when required customer information is missing
description: Verifies that the app blocks saving a new transaction when required customer information is missing and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Fill the PIN field with a valid PIN
Click the navigation item to open the transaction list
Leave the required customer information empty
Verify a customer information validation error is visible
Verify no new transaction is added to the transaction list

title: Reject invalid email format on login
description: Verifies the login form blocks submission with an invalid email format and shows an email validation error.

steps.description: Fill invalid-email-format into the email field
Fill any-password into the password field
Verify an email format validation error is visible

title: Require bengkel name on onboarding
description: Verifies onboarding prevents bengkel creation when the bengkel name is empty and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Leave the bengkel name field empty
Provide a valid setup PIN into the setup PIN field
Verify a bengkel name required validation error is visible

title: Keep user on transaction creation when saving fails due to missing required fields
description: Verifies that when required fields are missing, the user remains on the create-transaction form and can correct inputs.

steps.description: Fill the PIN field with a valid PIN
Click the navigation item to open the transaction list
Leave a required customer field empty
Verify the create-transaction form is still displayed
Verify a required-field validation error is visible

title: Show empty state when there are no transactions
description: Verifies that the transaction list shows an empty state when no transactions exist for the current local store.

steps.description: Fill the PIN field with a valid PIN
Click the navigation item to open the transaction list
Verify an empty state is displayed for the transaction list
